user.description: If you need help with the configuration have a look at the [documentation]({documentation_url}).

error.invalid_auth: The API key is invalid or missing the required ha:read scope.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Daynest host.
error.unsupported_contract: The Daynest server contract version is not supported by this integration.

update_failed.message: Failed to update data from the server.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Triggers an immediate data refresh from the Daynest backend. Useful after making changes in the Daynest app to update Home Assistant sensors without waiting for the next scheduled poll.

complete_task.name: Complete Task
complete_task.description: Marks a Daynest chore instance as complete. Requires the integration API key to have the ha:write scope.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The numeric ID of the chore instance to mark as complete. Obtain this ID from the Daynest app or API.

snooze_task.name: Snooze Task
snooze_task.description: Reschedules a Daynest chore instance to a later date. Requires the integration API key to have the ha:write scope.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The numeric ID of the chore instance to reschedule. Obtain this ID from the Daynest app or API.

days.name: Days
days.description: Number of days to snooze the task (1–30). Defaults to 1.

mark_medication_taken.name: Mark Medication Taken
mark_medication_taken.description: Marks a scheduled medication dose as taken. Requires the integration API key to have the ha:write scope.

medication_dose_id.name: Medication Dose ID
medication_dose_id.description: The numeric ID of the medication dose instance to mark as taken. Obtain this ID from the Daynest app or API.
